item.title: Receive Segment Coalescing
item.description: When receiving data, the miniport driver, NDIS, and TCP/IP must all look at each PDU’s header information separately.When large amounts of data are being received, this creates a large amount of overhead.

item.title: Azure Accelerated Networking
item.description: Azure SmartNIC Based on FPGAs, AccelNet offloads packet forwarding to SmartNIC hardware with Generic Flow Tables.GFT is a match-action language that defines specific operations on packets for one specific network flow.

item.title: Fuzzing yash
item.description: AFL++ Building AFL++ on Ubuntu First, install the latest LLVM from the official APT repository.Then, clone AFLplusplus and run the following commands.

item.title: Public Post-Mortems
item.description: This list is not curated yet.Here be dragons.2021-2025 slack.engineering/slacks-incident-on-2-22-22/ slack.engineering/slacks-outage-on-january-4th-2021/ www.atlassian.com/engineering/post-incident-review-april-2022-outage ardentperf.com/2022/02/10/a-hairy-postgresql-incident/ blog.cloudflare.com/post-mortem-on-cloudflare-control-plane-and-analytics-outage/ blog.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-outage-on-june-21-2022/ blog.cloudflare.com/partial-cloudflare-outage-on-october-25-2022/ gocardless.com/blog/incident-review-api-and-dashboard-outage-on-10th-october/ sourcehut.org/blog/2024-01-19-outage-post-mortem/ blog.roblox.com/2022/01/roblox-return-to-service-10-28-10-31-2021/ old.reddit.com/r/RedditEng/comments/11xx5o0/you_broke_reddit_the_piday_outage/ engineering.fb.com/2021/10/05/networking-traffic/outage-details/ lichess.org/@/thibault/blog/lichess-on-scala3-help-needed/2bpotLb0 aws.amazon.com/message/12721/ 2016-2020 status.cloud.google.com/incident/cloud-networking/19009 status.cloud.google.com/incident/compute/16007 github.blog/2016-02-03-january-28th-incident-report/ github.blog/2018-10-30-oct21-post-incident-analysis/ blog.cloudflare.com/incident-report-on-memory-leak-caused-by-cloudflare-parser-bug/ www.fortnite.com/news/postmortem-of-service-outage-at-3-4m-ccu blog.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-outage-on-july-17-2020/ blog.cloudflare.com/details-of-the-cloudflare-outage-on-july-2-2019/ about.gitlab.com/blog/2017/02/10/postmortem-of-database-outage-of-january-31/ about.gitlab.com/blog/2019/11/08/the-consul-outage-that-never-happened/ puri.sm/posts/the-great-purism-dns-outage-of-2018/ discord.statuspage.io/incidents/62gt9cgjwdgf 2011-2015 aws.amazon.com/message/65648/ aws.amazon.com/message/2329B7/ aws.amazon.com/message/680342/ aws.amazon.com/message/680587/ 2006-2010 groups.google.com/g/mongodb-user/c/UoqU8ofp134 See also github.com/danluu/post-mortems and danluu.com/postmortem-lessons/ .

item.title: Emergency Response
item.description: Playbooks Humans add latency, so thinking through and recording the best practices ahead of time in a “playbook”.It’s also a substitute for smart engineers able to think on the fly, and helps response to a high-stakes or time-sensitive page.

item.title: Postmortem
item.description: Criteria It is important to define postmortem criteria before an incident occurs so that everyone knows when a postmortem is necessary.Blameless Culture Importance of the blameless culture when conducting a postmortem can not be overstated.

item.title: Vim
item.description: Macro Tricks va{V can be used to select the outer block line-wise.Scrolling z., zt, zb move "cursor line" into respective position H, L, M move cursor to respective position Removing Auto-Inserted Comment Leader After pressing Enter or ‘o’, use CTRL-U to remove the comment leader.

item.title: Xcode Sanitizer Support
item.description: Xcode documentation lists several runtime tools, including sanitizers.Xcode provides several runtime tools to identify potential issues in your code: Address Sanitizer—The ASan tool identifies potential memory-related corruption issues.

item.title: ip
item.description: Global options -s for more verbose output (s for statistics).-s -s increases verbosity.Add -h for human readable stats and add -iec to print data size in IEC units (e.g.
